title: Data Explorer
description: The Data Explorer enables interactive investigation of OMOP CDM data, including data quality dashboards that profile source data conformance, completeness, and plausibility. Researchers can use this feature to assess dataset readiness before conducting formal analyses.
tips: Review Data Quality Dashboard results for your target data source before executing analyses to identify known data gaps or anomalies.
Pay particular attention to completeness metrics for clinical domains central to your research question.
Use plausibility checks to identify records with implausible values that may need to be addressed in upstream ETL processes.
Compare data quality profiles across data sources when planning federated analyses to anticipate heterogeneity in results.
